docs: Initializes the vault by wiring up the treasury fee recipient and instantiating the
token, auction, and oracle child contracts.
`treasury` must be a deployed treasury contract address; governance can
later reassign it via `update_treasury`.
constructors.label: new

docs: Emitted when the winning bid tokens are transferred out by the controller.
events.label: WinningBidTransferred

docs: Emitted when auction governance is transferred to a new account.
events.label: AuctionGovernanceUpdated

docs: Emitted when a bid is placed or raised on an auction.
events.label: BidPlaced

docs: Emitted when the admin account (allowed to bid on expired no-bid auctions) is updated.
events.label: AdminUpdated

docs: Emitted when a new liquidation auction is created.
events.label: AuctionCreated

docs: Emitted when a losing bidder withdraws their refund.
events.label: RefundWithdrawn

docs: Emitted when an auction is finalized, identifying the winning bidder.
events.label: AuctionFinalized

docs: Emitted whenever an owner sets or updates a spender's allowance.
events.label: Approval

docs: Emitted on token movement; `from = None` denotes a mint, `to = None` denotes a burn.
events.label: Transfer

docs: Emitted when oracle governance is transferred to a new account.
events.label: OracleGovernanceUpdated

docs: Emitted when the maximum allowed price deviation is changed.
events.label: MaxPriceDeviationUpdated

docs: Emitted when a reporter submits (or replaces) a price for the current round.
events.label: PriceSubmitted

docs: Emitted when a round is committed and a new latest price is recorded.
events.label: RoundCommitted

docs: Emitted when a reporter is enabled or disabled.
events.label: ReporterUpdated

docs: Emitted when the validator account is set or cleared.
events.label: ValidatorUpdated

docs: Emitted when governance control is transferred (and propagated to child contracts).
events.label: VaultGovernanceUpdated

docs: Emitted when a liquidation auction is created for an unsafe vault.
events.label: LiquidationAuctionCreated

docs: Emitted when a pending parameter update is cancelled by governance.
events.label: ContractParamsUpdateCancelled

docs: Emitted when a parameter update is queued behind the timelock.
events.label: ContractParamsUpdateScheduled

docs: Emitted when the contract is paused.
events.label: Paused

docs: Emitted when the contract is unpaused.
events.label: Unpaused

docs: Emitted when borrowed tUSDT is repaid; fee is paid in addition to the principal repayment.
events.label: TokensRepaid

docs: Emitted when a new vault is opened with initial collateral.
events.label: VaultCreated

docs: Emitted when tUSDT is borrowed against a vault; `amount` is gross, fee is the treasury cut.
events.label: TokensBorrowed

docs: Emitted when collateral is added to an existing vault.
events.label: CollateralAdded

docs: Emitted when interest is accrued onto a vault's debt balance.
events.label: InterestAccrued

docs: Emitted when a liquidation auction is settled: collateral leaves the vault and debt is cleared.
events.label: VaultLiquidated

docs: Emitted when the entire native balance of the contract is drained to abandon the vault, for emergency migration to a new deployment; **TESTNET ONLY**.
events.label: EmergencyDrained

docs: Emitted when collateral is withdrawn from a vault.
events.label: CollateralReleased

docs: Emitted when surplus tUSDT held by the vault is claimed to governance.
events.label: SurplusTusdtClaimed

docs: Emitted when the platform account is updated.
events.label: VaultPlatformUpdated

docs: Emitted when the treasury (fee recipient) account is updated.
events.label: VaultTreasuryUpdated

docs: Emitted after a scheduled parameter update is executed and becomes active.
events.label: ContractParamsUpdated

docs: Schedules a contract parameter update with a fixed timelock; only callable by governance.
messages.label: set_contract_params

docs: Executes the currently scheduled contract parameter update once its timelock has elapsed.
messages.label: execute_contract_params_update

docs: Cancels the currently scheduled contract parameter update; only callable by governance.
messages.label: cancel_contract_params_update

docs: Transfers vault governance to a new account, propagating the change to the child auction and oracle contracts.
messages.label: update_governance

docs: Updates the treasury (fee recipient) account; governance-only.
messages.label: update_treasury

docs: Updates the platform (pause-capable operator) account; governance-only.
messages.label: update_platform

docs: Pauses the contract, blocking user-facing mutations; callable by governance or platform.
messages.label: pause

docs: Unpauses the contract; governance-only (platform cannot unpause).
messages.label: unpause

docs: Transfers surplus TUSDT held by the vault contract to the treasury.
Permissionless — anyone may sweep accumulated surplus into the treasury, where it will
be booked across the funds on the next `distribute()` call.
messages.label: claim_surplus_tusdt

docs: **TESTNET ONLY** — Drains the entire native balance of the contract to `recipient`.
Use this before migrating to a new contract deployment when storage layout has
changed and you need to recover all collateral funds locked in this instance.
`total_collateral_balance` is zeroed so internal accounting stays consistent.
Only callable by governance.
messages.label: emergency_drain

docs: Creates a new vault for the caller with the transferred collateral and returns the vault ID.
messages.label: create_vault

docs: Adds the transferred collateral amount to an existing vault.
messages.label: add_collateral

docs: Borrows tokens against the vault's collateral, validating collateral ratio,
accruing interest, minting the fee portion to the treasury, and sending
the net borrowed tokens to the caller.
messages.label: borrow_token

docs: Repays borrowed tokens from a vault, charging the transaction fee in TUSDT,
routing accrued interest and the fee to the treasury, and burning only principal net supply.
messages.label: repay_token

docs: Accrues any elapsed interest for a vault and returns the updated debt balance.
messages.label: accrue_interest

docs: Releases collateral from a vault while ensuring the remaining collateral maintains the minimum collateral ratio.
messages.label: release_collateral

docs: Initiates a liquidation auction for an unsafe vault, returning the auction ID if successful.
messages.label: trigger_liquidation_auction

docs: Settles a finalized liquidation auction, transferring collateral to the winner,
routing accrued interest to the treasury, and burning only principal.
This remains callable while paused so governance can freeze new mutations without
trapping already-finalized auction proceeds in the auction contract.
messages.label: settle_liquidation_auction

docs: Retrieves the vault details for a given owner and vault ID.
messages.label: get_vault

docs: Returns the account ID of the deployed ERC-20 token contract.
messages.label: get_token_address

docs: Returns the account ID of the deployed auction contract.
messages.label: get_auction_address

docs: Returns the account ID of the oracle contract.
messages.label: get_oracle_address

docs: Returns the current governance account.
messages.label: governance

docs: Returns the current treasury (fee recipient) account.
messages.label: treasury

docs: Returns the current platform (pause-capable operator) account.
messages.label: platform

docs: Returns whether the contract is paused by governance.
messages.label: paused

docs: Returns the current contract parameters (collateral ratio, liquidation ratio, interest rate, etc.) in the external config format.
messages.label: get_contract_params

docs: Returns the currently scheduled parameter update, if any.
messages.label: get_pending_contract_params_update

docs: Returns the collateral balance for a vault, or None if the vault does not exist.
messages.label: get_vault_collateral_balance

docs: Returns the total collateral balance across all vaults.
messages.label: get_total_collateral_balance

docs: Returns the total borrowed debt across all vaults owned by an account.
messages.label: get_total_debt

docs: Calculates the token value of a vault's collateral based on the current price ratio.
messages.label: get_vault_collateral_value

docs: Returns the maximum token amount that can be borrowed against a vault's collateral.
messages.label: get_max_borrow

docs: Returns the auction ID for an active liquidation of a vault, or None if there is no active liquidation.
messages.label: get_liquidation_auction_id

docs: Returns the total number of vaults created across all owners.
messages.label: get_total_vaults_count

docs: Returns the number of vaults owned by a specific account.
messages.label: get_vaults_count

docs: Returns a paginated list of vaults owned by a specific account.
messages.label: get_vaults

docs: Returns a paginated list of all vaults across all owners.
messages.label: get_all_vaults
